name: the-laws-of-human-nature
description: Robert Greene's The Laws of Human Nature — a comprehensive toolkit for decoding the hidden emotional forces that drive human behavior, from irrationality and narcissism to envy and self-sabotage.
useCase: Understanding irrational behavior, reading people's true character, managing difficult people, improving self-awareness, becoming a better leader, mastering persuasion.
knownRisks: Greene's framework can feel cynical — balance with empathy and genuine care for others
These laws describe patterns, not individuals — avoid stereotyping or pathologizing people
Use persuasion techniques ethically — manipulation damages trust in the long run
